endpoints.name: Lists all of the connection gateways
endpoints.description: Gets a list of gateways under a subscription
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: List of custom APIs
endpoints.description: Gets a list of all custom APIs for a subscription id
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: Gets a list of installed gateways that the user is an admin of
endpoints.description: Gets a list of installed gateways that the user is an admin of, in a specific subscription and at a certain location
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.

endpoints.name: Gets an installed gateway that the user is an admin of
endpoints.description: Get a specific installed gateway that the user is an admin of, in a specific subscription and at a certain location
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{GATEWAYID}} with a real gatewayid.

endpoints.name: Returns API definition from WSDL
endpoints.description: Parses the specified WSDL and extracts the API definition
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.

endpoints.name: Lists WSDL interfaces
endpoints.description: This returns the list of interfaces in the WSDL
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.

endpoints.name: Lists managed APIs
endpoints.description: Gets a list of managed APIs
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.

endpoints.name: Gets managed API
endpoints.description: Gets a managed API
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{APINAME}} with a real apiname.

endpoints.name: Lists all of the connection gateways
endpoints.description: Gets a list of gateways under a subscription and in a specific resource group
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Gets a specific gateway
endpoints.description: Gets a specific gateway under a subscription and in a specific resource group
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{CONNECTIONGATEWAYNAME}} with a real connectiongatewayname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Replaces a specific gateway
endpoints.description: Creates or updates a specific gateway for under a subscription and in a specific resource group
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{CONNECTIONGATEWAYNAME}} with a real connectiongatewayname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Deletes a specific gateway
endpoints.description: Deletes a specific gateway for under a subscription and in a specific resource group
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{CONNECTIONGATEWAYNAME}} with a real connectiongatewayname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Updates a specific gateway
endpoints.description: Updates a connection gateway's tags
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{CONNECTIONGATEWAYNAME}} with a real connectiongatewayname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Get all connections
endpoints.description: Gets a list of connections
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Get a connection

endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{CONNECTIONNAME}} with a real connectionname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Replace an existing connection

endpoints.name: Delete an existing connection

endpoints.name: Update an existing connection

endpoints.name: Confirms the consent code for a connection

endpoints.name: Lists consent links for a connection

endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{CONNECTIONNAME}} with a real connectionname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: List of custom APIs
endpoints.description: Gets a list of all custom APIs in a subscription for a specific resource group
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Get a custom API

endpoints.name: Replaces an existing custom API

endpoints.name: Delete a custom API
endpoints.description: Deletes a custom API from the resource group
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{APINAME}} with a real apiname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Update an existing custom API
endpoints.description: Updates an existing custom API's tags
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{APINAME}} with a real apiname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Moves the custom API
endpoints.description: Moves a specific custom API
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{APINAME}} with a real apiname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
